textByHash.0f010ddd5a26984972faa8ed81768244d998c212: I cannot speak to the purpose the smithy has, but I might be able to shed some light on the purposes it could be given.
textByHash.102fe2077b74100b8583e2fac9e1d57388078dc8: This isle is a small wonder. The rock formations here bear a slight resemblance to those from my own realm.
textByHash.39f59407107140b104088cb2e1078631311a9cb7: Yes, water is an ineffective coolant at this temperature. Perhaps I could offer an alternative.
textByHash.3e28665941cfe0437f75079c86af04306c5077e5: Thank you. There is little I can ask of you given the nature of my other agreements, but watching you work on this isle does bring me some comfort.
textByHash.43a07046e0390494f66bdbc952f4f0bb671b06ad: Yes. The process is quite involved. Smaller shards must be melted into nuggets for stability, and then combined into chunks.
textByHash.515f6785bc61857b9a8cf3dd292b7c8ee7dbbd8d: I can see you eyeing the liquid. It is best you do not ask.
textByHash.588e0c658179b480c3ade292b201b34b0034a99c: Have another cloth. Remember, it only offers a brief respite from the heat. You'll want to time bursts of exertion right after using it.
textByHash.5f8514e76b6fcc837a265d1fff3a79bd09c886e2: Mostly fetching records, and dying. When I am not doing that, I rest here. The features of this isle remind me of those I once knew.
textByHash.97e086f10b4fd3f36facd0aafc511476ee669fd5: The furnace is capable of extremely high temperatures. Whilst not very helpful for your ores, it can melt metal from our realm.
textByHash.9e4db799333dfc7be289664c11d7da81c63f19cf: I am afraid other agreements bar me from telling you much of my past. Nowadays, I am a humble servant of Yama, existing only to do as he pleases.
textByHash.acbb9cbd18f783b92c262638f695bc3f2d90eb5b: No, friend, you signed it right here.
textByHash.beaf04e4eb2e1d63944ba45be076a9faa64f163b: I can say nothing more than that it was not here when I arrived.
textByHash.bf8481c70eedc99167dbbac11102a3f79f4834de: The liquid will only offer a brief respite from the heat, but I find it can help to apply it frequently between bursts of exertion.
textByHash.c2f42011ec7785322a3f28b25fd5f9b9e9fbe5b2: I already skirt as closely as I can to what I am disallowed from sharing. I apologise, but I cannot answer further.
textByHash.ca0dcbdaba60fe40963aa4cee1b70c79633ceb5f: I am not alone in this amongst my kind, but I understand that I am rare. I have my reasons for being this way.
textByHash.e44b56d492690a1952adb13a2f7fffcba8ed7231: Yes, infernal shale is kept together largely by the pressure from above. Once a piece is broken off, it can easily be broken down with a hammer and chisel.
textByHash.e69e5a9b0851d9817006336f678ef03455036213: Yes, the unique composition of this chasm does create a warm environment.
textByHash.e6e6ff6d6b9e3908be1b1b986c0203e48acc24b9: I suppose since you already know my name, you are asking who I am in the context of history and society.
textByHash.ed4c12424c7e3b11c4aa43174c83ceb8f1ffaa7a: Excellent. It is a pleasure to make your acquaintance.
textByHash.ff94cabd1aa9f81379d58049ff41e8e23e6e34d7: Not quite, though they are necessary to power the furnace. Nobody but Yama has access to the kinds of ores it was designed for.
